description_long: This is a military-style SUV with a boxy, utilitarian design, painted in olive drab green with prominent white star insignias on the hood and rear quarter panel, reminiscent of classic World War II Willys Jeeps. The vehicle features an open cabin with two front seats and a rear bench, all upholstered in brown, and a simple dashboard with a large steering wheel. The windshield is upright and split, with two round side mirrors mounted on either side. The SUV has rugged, deep-treaded tires, a spare tire mounted on the rear, and a jerry can attached to the back for extra fuel. The front grille is vertical with seven slots, flanked by round headlights, and the vehicle has minimal overhangs for off-road capability. Additional details include visible side steps, exposed wheel arches, and utilitarian accessories such as a shovel and tools mounted on the side.
description: A classic military-style olive green SUV with white star insignias, open cabin seating, rugged tires, and utilitarian accessories like a spare tire and jerry can.
description_view_0: Front view shows the upright split windshield, vertical grille with seven slots, round headlights, and the large white star insignia on the hood.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the open cabin, brown seats, side step, mounted tools, and the rear spare tire and jerry can.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the spare tire, jerry can, rear bench seat, and the open cargo area with visible dashboard and steering wheel.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the open seating, side step, exposed wheel arches, and the white star insignia on the rear quarter panel.
attribute_wheel_design: steel wheels with six circular holes and rugged off-road tires
